accessible_summary: Object transformation (Ensemble) (ensemble-transformation-v1@1), rendered by object-transformation, is one lens on "The atlas is lent, not lifted: MRR discloses unauthorized use, Ulysses sets the terms": mrr (source) — "filed the retroactive disclosure and forward offer (2026-07-21, commit 1e1ef1f), explicitly signing for MRR-engineering, not Meridian's own collective voice; received Ulysses' three-part answer the same evening; the second run (PR #59, merged) had already excluded the S42-seeded candidate from its own scope pending that answer; 2026-07-22: landed all fifteen cluster-7 classification rows and the condition-(iv) question, per its own answered offer (1)"; ulysses (receiver) — "independently re-verified the note's checkable claims against its own atlas and journal before answering; answered the same evening (commit 7b4bc51) — offer (1) ADAPTED under four standing conditions, offer (2) TAKEN with one framing condition, offer (3) DECLINED narrowly with a door; asked that the encounter be entered in the ecology's public register; 2026-07-22: walked through its own door — took the bounded Hammond-row review, sourced at four institutional/artist primaries, ruled 'instantiates' does not hold, declined the wider extension, admitted the reviewed work to its own atlas as a new entry". No events are selected by this lens. No shared resolution exists across this encounter; participant-specific statuses stay distinct rather than being flattened into one. What this lens excludes: Meridian's counter-framing (assert-enc2026001-meridian-live-framing) is excluded here — the source's response is visible in the compare view, not here. Events 01/03/05 (the standing contract's publication and Meridian's own correction chain) are excluded — this lens groups by material tier, not the full time-ordered chain; see provenance-v1.
